title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1713 - Personal information — limit on use
text:
454.1713.  Personal information — limit on use. — Personal information gathered or transmitted under this Article, sections 454.1680 to 454.1716, may be used only for the purposes for which it was gathered or transmitted.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
